content: A microcontroller by Raspberry Pi, dual CPU architecture (ARM Cortex-M33 / RISC-V Hazard3), 150MHz, no flash, 520KB SRAM, 12 PIO state machines, VQFN-80
Not a standalone power converter; internal on-chip voltage regulator for digital core supply; DVDD is the digital core power supply, should be placed next to voltage regulator output.
Should be placed next to DVDD.
RPi Pico USB QSPI I2C UART ADC SC1510
